h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif font with significant leading space above and below. Left-aligned.

h2.visual_description: Not present in sample, but likely a smaller bold sans-serif variant.

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized text in a narrow right-hand margin column, starting with 'Figure X.X-'
Small-font block at the bottom of the page, prefixed with a numerical index

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numerical superscript in-text; full bibliographic entry in footer including DOI and retrieval dates.

layout_info.primary_flow: Single-column main body with a dedicated right-side margin for captions.
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-right footer containing 'Chapter Title | Page Number' (e.g., Gestalt's Principles | 89).
